title: viola incisa
intro: Viola incisa, also known as the Japanese pimpernel or mountain pansy, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the violet family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits associated with Viola incisa include potential relief from stress and anxiety, improved immune function, and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, Viola incisa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
